scripts.setup: vercel link --project construction-web --scope celn --yes && vercel env pull .env.local --environment development --scope celn --yes && PG_PORT=$(sed -n '4p' "$(brew --prefix)/var/postgresql@17/postmaster.pid" 2>/dev/null); PG_PORT=${PG_PORT:-5432} && sed -i '' "s|^construction_POSTGRES_PRISMA_URL=.*|construction_POSTGRES_PRISMA_URL=\"postgresql://$USER@localhost:${PG_PORT}/construction\"|" .env.local && sed -i '' "s|^construction_POSTGRES_URL_NON_POOLING=.*|construction_POSTGRES_URL_NON_POOLING=\"postgresql://$USER@localhost:${PG_PORT}/construction\"|" .env.local && sed -i '' 's|\\n"|"| ' .env.local && (grep -q '^NODE_OPTIONS=' .env.local || echo 'NODE_OPTIONS="--max-old-space-size=8192"' >> .env.local) && npm install
